contents:
Require Import Basics.Overture Basics.Equivalences Basics.PathGroupoids
               Basics.Tactics Basics.Trunc Basics.Decidable Basics.Iff.
Generalizable Variables X A B f g n.
(* TODO: ": rename" is needed because the default names changed in Rocq 9.2.0.  When the minimum supported version is >= 9.2.0, the ": rename" can be removed. *)
Scheme prod_ind := Induction for prod Sort Type.
Arguments prod_ind {A B} P f p : rename.

(** ** Unpacking *)

(** Sometimes we would like to prove [Q u] where [u : A * B] by writing [u] as a pair [(fst u ; snd u)]. This is accomplished by [unpack_prod]. We want tight control over the proof, so we just write it down even though is looks a bit scary. *)

Definition unpack_prod `{P : A * B -> Type} (u : A * B) :
  P (fst u, snd u) -> P u
  := idmap.
(** Now we write down the reverse. *)

Definition pack_prod `{P : A * B -> Type} (u : A * B) :
  P u -> P (fst u, snd u)
  := idmap.

Definition eta_prod `(z : A * B) : (fst z, snd z) = z
  := 1.

(** ** Paths *)

(** With this version of the function, we often have to give [z] and [z'] explicitly, so we make them explicit arguments. *)

Definition path_prod_uncurried {A B : Type} (z z' : A * B)
  (pq : (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z'))
  : (z = z').

goals.conclusion: z = z'

hypotheses.type: (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z')

goals.conclusion: z = z'

hypotheses.type: (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z')

contents: change ((fst z, snd z) = (fst z', snd z')).

goals.conclusion: (fst z, snd z) = (fst z', snd z')

hypotheses.type: (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z')

goals.conclusion: (fst z, snd z) = (fst z, snd z')

hypotheses.type: (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z')

goals.conclusion: (fst z, snd z) = (fst z, snd z)

hypotheses.type: (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z')

contents: (** This is the curried one you usually want to use in practice.  We define it in terms of the uncurried one, since it's the uncurried one that is proven below to be an equivalence. *)

Definition path_prod {A B : Type} (z z' : A * B) :
  (fst z = fst z') -> (snd z = snd z') -> (z = z')
  := fun p q => path_prod_uncurried z z' (p,q).

(** This version produces only paths between pairs, as opposed to paths between arbitrary inhabitants of product types.  But it has the advantage that the components of those pairs can more often be inferred. *)
(** Now we show how these things compute. *)

goals.conclusion: ap fst (path_prod z z' p q) = p
ap fst (path_prod z z' p q) = p

contents: change z with (fst z, snd z).

goals.conclusion: ap fst (path_prod (fst z, snd z) z' p q) = p

contents: change z' with (fst z', snd z').

goals.conclusion: ap fst (path_prod (fst z, snd z) (fst z', snd z') p q) = p
ap fst (path_prod (fst z, snd z) (fst z, snd z) 1 1) = 1
ap fst (path_prod' p q) = p
ap fst (path_prod' p q) = p
ap snd (path_prod z z' p q) = q
ap snd (path_prod z z' p q) = q

contents: change z with (fst z, snd z).

goals.conclusion: ap snd (path_prod (fst z, snd z) z' p q) = q

contents: change z' with (fst z', snd z').

goals.conclusion: ap snd (path_prod (fst z, snd z) (fst z', snd z') p q) = q
ap snd (path_prod (fst z, snd z) (fst z, snd z) 1 1) = 1
ap snd (path_prod' p q) = q
ap snd (path_prod' p q) = q

contents:
Definition eta_path_prod {A B : Type} {z z' : A * B} (p : z = z') :
  path_prod _ _(ap fst p) (ap snd p) = p.

goals.conclusion: path_prod z z' (ap fst p) (ap snd p) = p
path_prod z z' (ap fst p) (ap snd p) = p
path_prod z z (ap fst 1) (ap snd 1) = 1

contents:
Definition ap_path_prod {A B C : Type} (f : A -> B -> C)
           {z z' : A * B} (p : fst z = fst z') (q : snd z = snd z')
: ap (fun z => f (fst z) (snd z)) (path_prod _ _ p q)
  = ap011 f p q.

goals.conclusion: ap (fun z0 : A * B => f (fst z0) (snd z0)) (path_prod z z' p q) = ap011 f p q
ap (fun z0 : A * B => f (fst z0) (snd z0)) (path_prod z z' p q) = ap011 f p q

contents: destruct z, z'; simpl in *; destruct p, q; reflexivity.
(** Now we show how these compute with transport. *)

Lemma transport_path_prod_uncurried {A B} (P : A * B -> Type) {x y : A * B}
      (H : (fst x = fst y) * (snd x = snd y))
      (Px : P x)
: transport P (path_prod_uncurried _ _ H) Px
  = transport (fun x => P (x, snd y))
              (fst H)
              (transport (fun y => P (fst x, y))
                         (snd H)
                         Px).

goals.conclusion:
transport P (path_prod_uncurried x y H) Px =
transport (fun x0 : A => P (x0, snd y)) (fst H)
  (transport (fun y0 : B => P (fst x, y0)) (snd H) Px)

hypotheses.type: (fst x = fst y) * (snd x = snd y)

goals.conclusion:
transport P (path_prod_uncurried x y H) Px =
transport (fun x0 : A => P (x0, snd y)) (fst H)
  (transport (fun y0 : B => P (fst x, y0)) (snd H) Px)

hypotheses.type: (fst x = fst y) * (snd x = snd y)

contents: destruct x, y, H; simpl in *.

goals.conclusion:
transport P
  match fst1 in (_ = a) return ((fst, snd) = (a, snd0)) with
  | 1 =>
      match snd1 in (_ = b) return ((fst, snd) = (fst, b)) with
      | 1 => 1
      end
  end Px =
transport (fun x : A => P (x, snd0)) fst1
  (transport (fun y : B => P (fst, y)) snd1 Px)

transport P 1 Px =
transport (fun x : A => P (x, snd)) 1
  (transport (fun y : B => P (fst, y)) 1 Px)

contents:
Definition transport_path_prod {A B} (P : A * B -> Type) {x y : A * B}
           (HA : fst x = fst y)
           (HB : snd x = snd y)
           (Px : P x)
: transport P (path_prod _ _ HA HB) Px
  = transport (fun x => P (x, snd y))
              HA
              (transport (fun y => P (fst x, y))
                         HB
                         Px)
  := transport_path_prod_uncurried P (HA, HB) Px.

Definition transport_path_prod'
           {A B} (P : A * B -> Type)
           {x y : A}
           {x' y' : B}
           (HA : x = y)
           (HB : x' = y')
           (Px : P (x,x'))
: transport P (path_prod' HA HB) Px
  = transport (fun x => P (x, y'))
              HA
              (transport (fun y => P (x, y))
                         HB
                         Px)
  := @transport_path_prod _ _ P (x, x') (y, y') HA HB Px.
(** This lets us identify the path space of a product type, up to equivalence. *)

Instance isequiv_path_prod {A B : Type} {z z' : A * B}
: IsEquiv (path_prod_uncurried z z') | 0.

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (path_prod_uncurried z z')
IsEquiv (path_prod_uncurried z z')

contents:
refine (Build_IsEquiv _ _ _
            (fun r => (ap fst r, ap snd r))
            eta_path_prod
            (fun pq => path_prod'
                         (ap_fst_path_prod (fst pq) (snd pq))
                         (ap_snd_path_prod (fst pq) (snd pq)))
            _).

goals.conclusion:
forall x : (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z'),
eta_path_prod (path_prod_uncurried z z' x) =
ap (path_prod_uncurried z z')
  (path_prod' (ap_fst_path_prod (fst x) (snd x))
     (ap_snd_path_prod (fst x) (snd x)))

contents: destruct z as [x y], z' as [x' y'].

goals.conclusion:
forall x0 : (fst (x, y) = fst (x', y')) * (snd (x, y) = snd (x', y')),
eta_path_prod (path_prod_uncurried (x, y) (x', y') x0) =
ap (path_prod_uncurried (x, y) (x', y'))
  (path_prod' (ap_fst_path_prod (fst x0) (snd x0))
     (ap_snd_path_prod (fst x0) (snd x0)))

contents: intros [p q]; simpl in p, q.

goals.conclusion:
eta_path_prod (path_prod_uncurried (x, y) (x', y') (p, q)) =
ap (path_prod_uncurried (x, y) (x', y'))
  (path_prod' (ap_fst_path_prod (fst (p, q)) (snd (p, q)))
     (ap_snd_path_prod (fst (p, q)) (snd (p, q))))

contents:
Definition equiv_path_prod {A B : Type} (z z' : A * B)
  : (fst z = fst z') * (snd z = snd z')  <~>  (z = z')
  := Build_Equiv _ _ (path_prod_uncurried z z') _.

(** Path algebra *)

(** Composition.  The next three lemma are displayed equations in section 2.6 of the book, but they have no numbers so we can't put them into [HoTTBook.v]. *)

Definition path_prod_pp {A B : Type} (z z' z'' : A * B)
           (p : fst z = fst z') (p' : fst z' = fst z'')
           (q : snd z = snd z') (q' : snd z' = snd z'')
: path_prod z z'' (p @ p') (q @ q') = path_prod z z' p q @ path_prod z' z'' p' q'.

goals.conclusion:
path_prod z z'' (p @ p') (q @ q') =
path_prod z z' p q @ path_prod z' z'' p' q'

path_prod z z'' (p @ p') (q @ q') =
path_prod z z' p q @ path_prod z' z'' p' q'

contents: destruct z, z', z''; simpl in *; destruct p, p', q, q'.

goals.conclusion:
path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) (1 @ 1) (1 @ 1) =
path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1 @ path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1

contents:
Definition path_prod_pp_p  {A B : Type} (u v z w : A * B)
           (p : fst u = fst v) (q : fst v = fst z) (r : fst z = fst w)
           (p' : snd u = snd v) (q' : snd v = snd z) (r' : snd z = snd w)
: path_prod_pp u z w (p @ q) r (p' @ q') r'
  @ whiskerR (path_prod_pp u v z p q p' q') (path_prod z w r r')
  @ concat_pp_p (path_prod u v p p') (path_prod v z q q') (path_prod z w r r')
  = ap011 (path_prod u w) (concat_pp_p p q r) (concat_pp_p p' q' r')
    @ path_prod_pp u v w p (q @ r) p' (q' @ r')
    @ whiskerL (path_prod u v p p') (path_prod_pp v z w q r q' r').

goals.conclusion:
(path_prod_pp u z w (p @ q) r (p' @ q') r' @
 whiskerR (path_prod_pp u v z p q p' q') (path_prod z w r r')) @
concat_pp_p (path_prod u v p p') (path_prod v z q q') (path_prod z w r r') =
(ap011 (path_prod u w) (concat_pp_p p q r) (concat_pp_p p' q' r') @
 path_prod_pp u v w p (q @ r) p' (q' @ r')) @
whiskerL (path_prod u v p p') (path_prod_pp v z w q r q' r')

(path_prod_pp u z w (p @ q) r (p' @ q') r' @
 whiskerR (path_prod_pp u v z p q p' q') (path_prod z w r r')) @
concat_pp_p (path_prod u v p p') (path_prod v z q q') (path_prod z w r r') =
(ap011 (path_prod u w) (concat_pp_p p q r) (concat_pp_p p' q' r') @
 path_prod_pp u v w p (q @ r) p' (q' @ r')) @
whiskerL (path_prod u v p p') (path_prod_pp v z w q r q' r')

contents: destruct u, v, z, w; simpl in *; destruct p, p', q, q', r, r'.

goals.conclusion:
(path_prod_pp (fst, snd) (fst, snd) (fst, snd) (1 @ 1) 1 (1 @ 1) 1 @
 whiskerR (path_prod_pp (fst, snd) (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1 1 1)
   (path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1)) @
concat_pp_p (path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1)
  (path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1) (path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1) =
(ap011 (path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd)) (concat_pp_p 1 1 1)
   (concat_pp_p 1 1 1) @
 path_prod_pp (fst, snd) (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 (1 @ 1) 1 (1 @ 1)) @
whiskerL (path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1)
  (path_prod_pp (fst, snd) (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1 1 1)

contents:
Definition path_prod_V {A B : Type} (u v: A * B)
           (p : fst u = fst v)
           (q : snd u = snd v)
  : path_prod v u p^ q^ = (path_prod u v p q)^.

goals.conclusion: path_prod v u p^ q^ = (path_prod u v p q)^
path_prod v u p^ q^ = (path_prod u v p q)^

contents: destruct u, v; simpl in *; destruct p, q.

goals.conclusion:
path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1^ 1^ =
(path_prod (fst, snd) (fst, snd) 1 1)^

contents:
Definition transport_prod {A : Type} {P Q : A -> Type} {a a' : A} (p : a = a')
  (z : P a * Q a)
  : transport (fun a => P a * Q a) p z  =  (p # (fst z), p # (snd z))
  := match p with idpath => 1 end.

Definition functor_prod {A A' B B' : Type} (f:A->A') (g:B->B')
  : A * B -> A' * B'
  := fun z => (f (fst z), g (snd z)).

Definition ap_functor_prod {A A' B B' : Type} (f:A->A') (g:B->B')
  (z z' : A * B) (p : fst z = fst z') (q : snd z = snd z')
  : ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod _ _ p q)
  = path_prod (functor_prod f g z) (functor_prod f g z') (ap f p) (ap g q).

goals.conclusion:
ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod z z' p q) =
path_prod (functor_prod f g z) (functor_prod f g z') (ap f p) (ap g q)

ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod z z' p q) =
path_prod (functor_prod f g z) (functor_prod f g z') (ap f p) (ap g q)

contents: destruct z as [a b]; destruct z' as [a' b'].

goals.conclusion:
ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod (a, b) (a', b') p q) =
path_prod (functor_prod f g (a, b)) (functor_prod f g (a', b')) 
  (ap f p) (ap g q)

ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod (a, b) (a', b') p q) =
path_prod (functor_prod f g (a, b)) (functor_prod f g (a', b')) 
  (ap f p) (ap g q)

ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod (a, b) (a, b) 1 1) =
path_prod (functor_prod f g (a, b)) (functor_prod f g (a, b)) 
  (ap f 1) (ap g 1)

contents:
Instance isequiv_functor_prod `{IsEquiv A A' f} `{IsEquiv B B' g}
: IsEquiv (functor_prod f g) | 1000.

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (functor_prod f g)
IsEquiv (functor_prod f g)
A' * B' -> A * B
functor_prod f g o ?equiv_inv == idmap
?equiv_inv o functor_prod f g == idmap

forall x : A * B,
?eisretr (functor_prod f g x) = ap (functor_prod f g) (?eissect x)
A' * B' -> A * B
functor_prod f g o functor_prod f^-1 g^-1 == idmap
functor_prod f g (functor_prod f^-1 g^-1 z) = z
functor_prod f^-1 g^-1 o functor_prod f g == idmap
functor_prod f^-1 g^-1 (functor_prod f g w) = w

forall x : A * B,
((fun z : A' * B' => path_prod' (eisretr f (fst z)) (eisretr g (snd z)))
 :
 functor_prod f g o functor_prod f^-1 g^-1 == idmap) 
  (functor_prod f g x) =
ap (functor_prod f g)
  (((fun w : A * B => path_prod' (eissect f (fst w)) (eissect g (snd w)))
    :
    functor_prod f^-1 g^-1 o functor_prod f g == idmap) x)

path_prod' (eisretr f (f a)) (eisretr g (g b)) =
ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod' (eissect f a) (eissect g b))

contents: lhs napply (ap (fun p => path_prod' p _) (eisadj f _)).

goals.conclusion:
path_prod' (ap f (eissect f (fst (a, b)))) (eisretr g (g b)) =
ap (functor_prod f g) (path_prod' (eissect f a) (eissect g b))

path_prod' (ap f (eissect f (fst (a, b)))) (eisretr g (g b)) =
path_prod
  (functor_prod f g (functor_prod f^-1 g^-1 (functor_prod f g (a, b))))
  (functor_prod f g (a, b)) (ap f (eissect f a)) (ap g (eissect g b))

contents:
Definition equiv_functor_prod `{IsEquiv A A' f} `{IsEquiv B B' g}
  : A * B <~> A' * B'.

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (functor_prod f g)

contents: (* i.e., search the context for instances *)

Definition equiv_functor_prod' {A A' B B' : Type} (f : A <~> A') (g : B <~> B')
  : A * B <~> A' * B'.

goals.conclusion: IsEquiv (functor_prod f g)

contents:
Definition equiv_functor_prod_l {A B B' : Type} (g : B <~> B')
  : A * B <~> A * B'
  := 1 *E g.

Definition equiv_functor_prod_r {A A' B : Type} (f : A <~> A')
  : A * B <~> A' * B
  := f *E 1.

Definition iff_functor_prod {A A' B B' : Type} (f : A <-> A') (g : B <-> B')
  : A * B <-> A' * B'
  := (functor_prod (fst f) (fst g) , functor_prod (snd f) (snd g)).

(** ** Symmetry *)

(** This is a special property of [prod], of course, not an instance of a general family of facts about types. *)
Definition equiv_prod_symm (A B : Type) : A * B <~> B * A.

goals.conclusion: A * B <~> B * A
A * B <~> B * A

contents:
(** ** Associativity *)

(** This, too, is a special property of [prod], of course, not an instance of a general family of facts about types. *)
Definition equiv_prod_assoc (A B C : Type) : A * (B * C) <~> (A * B) * C.

goals.conclusion: A * (B * C) <~> A * B * C
A * (B * C) <~> A * B * C

contents:
Definition prod_empty_r@{u} (X : Type@{u}) : X * Empty <~> Empty
  := (Build_Equiv@{u u} _ _ snd _).

Definition prod_empty_l@{u} (X : Type@{u}) : Empty * X <~> Empty
  := (Build_Equiv@{u u} _ _ fst _).
Definition prod_unit_r X : X * Unit <~> X.

goals.conclusion: X * Unit <~> X
X * Unit <~> X
IsEquiv fst
fst o (fun x : X => (x, tt)) == idmap
(fun x : X => (x, tt)) o fst == idmap
forall x : X * Unit, ?eisretr (fst x) = ap fst (?eissect x)
fst o (fun x : X => (x, tt)) == idmap
(fun x : X => (x, tt)) o fst == idmap

forall x : X * Unit,
((fun x0 : X => 1) : fst o (fun x0 : X => (x0, tt)) == idmap) (fst x) =
ap fst
  (((fun x0 : X * Unit =>
     (fun (x1 : X) (snd : Unit) =>
      match snd as u return ((fst (x1, u), tt) = (x1, u)) with
      | tt => 1
      end) (fst x0) (snd x0))
    :
    (fun x0 : X => (x0, tt)) o fst == idmap) x)

contents: Definition prod_unit_l X : Unit * X <~> X.

goals.conclusion: Unit * X <~> X
Unit * X <~> X
IsEquiv snd
snd o (fun x : X => (tt, x)) == idmap
(fun x : X => (tt, x)) o snd == idmap
forall x : Unit * X, ?eisretr (snd x) = ap snd (?eissect x)
snd o (fun x : X => (tt, x)) == idmap
(fun x : X => (tt, x)) o snd == idmap

forall x : Unit * X,
((fun x0 : X => 1) : snd o (fun x0 : X => (tt, x0)) == idmap) (snd x) =
ap snd
  (((fun x0 : Unit * X =>
     (fun fst : Unit =>
      match
        fst as u
        return (forall snd : X, (tt, Overture.snd (u, snd)) = (u, snd))
      with
      | tt => fun x1 : X => 1
      end) (fst x0) (snd x0))
    :
    (fun x0 : X => (tt, x0)) o snd == idmap) x)

contents:
(** ** Universal mapping properties *)

(** Ordinary universal mapping properties are expressed as equivalences of sets or spaces of functions.  In type theory, we can go beyond this and express an equivalence of types of *dependent* functions.  Moreover, because the product type can expressed both positively and negatively, it has both a left universal property and a right one. *)

(* First the positive universal property. *)

Instance isequiv_prod_ind `(P : A * B -> Type)
: IsEquiv (prod_ind P) | 0
  := Build_IsEquiv
       _ _
       (prod_ind P)
       (fun f x y => f (x, y))
       (fun _ => 1)
       (fun _ => 1)
       (fun _ => 1).

Definition equiv_prod_ind `(P : A * B -> Type)
  : (forall (a : A) (b : B), P (a, b)) <~> (forall p : A * B, P p)
  := Build_Equiv _ _ (prod_ind P) _.
(* The non-dependent version, which is a special case, is the currying equivalence. *)

Definition equiv_uncurry (A B C : Type)
  : (A -> B -> C) <~> (A * B -> C)
  := equiv_prod_ind (fun _ => C).

Definition prod_coind `(f : forall x:X, A x) `(g : forall x:X, B x)
  : forall x, A x * B x
  := prod_coind_uncurried (f, g).

Instance isequiv_prod_coind `(A : X -> Type) (B : X -> Type)
: IsEquiv (@prod_coind_uncurried X A B) | 0
  := Build_IsEquiv
       _ _
       (@prod_coind_uncurried X A B)
       (fun h => (fun x => fst (h x), fun x => snd (h x)))
       (fun _ => 1)
       (fun _ => 1)
       (fun _ => 1).

Definition equiv_prod_coind `(A : X -> Type) (B : X -> Type)
  : ((forall x, A x) * (forall x, B x)) <~> (forall x, A x * B x)
  := Build_Equiv _ _ (@prod_coind_uncurried X A B) _.
Instance istrunc_prod `{IsTrunc n A} `{IsTrunc n B} : IsTrunc n (A * B) | 100.

goals.conclusion: IsTrunc n (A * B)
IsTrunc n (A * B)

contents: generalize dependent B; generalize dependent A.

goals.conclusion:
forall A : Type,
IsTrunc n A -> forall B : Type, IsTrunc n B -> IsTrunc n (A * B)

contents: simple_induction n n IH; simpl; (intros A ? B ?).

goals.conclusion: Contr (A * B)
IsTrunc n.+1 (A * B)

hypotheses.type:
forall A0 : Type,
IsTrunc n A0 -> forall B0 : Type, IsTrunc n B0 -> IsTrunc n (A0 * B0)

goals.conclusion: Contr (A * B)
forall y : A * B, (center A, center B) = y

(** Interaction of [ap] and uncurry *)

(** The function in [ap011] can be uncurried *)

Definition ap_uncurry {A B C} (f : A -> B -> C) {a a' : A} (p : a = a')
  {b b' : B} (q : b = b')
  : ap (uncurry f) (path_prod' p q) = ap011 f p q.

goals.conclusion: ap (uncurry f) (path_prod' p q) = ap011 f p q
ap (uncurry f) (path_prod' p q) = ap011 f p q

contents:
Definition hfiber_functor_prod {A B C D : Type} (f : A -> B) (g : C -> D) y
  : hfiber (functor_prod f g) y <~> (hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y)).

goals.conclusion: hfiber (functor_prod f g) y <~> hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y)
hfiber (functor_prod f g) y <~> hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y)

hfiber (fun z : A * C => (f (fst z), g (snd z))) y <~>
hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y)

hfiber (fun z : A * C => (f (fst z), g (snd z))) y ->
hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y)

hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y) ->
hfiber (fun z : A * C => (f (fst z), g (snd z))) y
?f o ?g == idmap
?g o ?f == idmap

hfiber (fun z : A * C => (f (fst z), g (snd z))) y ->
hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y)

contents: exact (fun x => ((fst x.1; ap fst x.2), (snd x.1; ap snd x.2))).

goals.conclusion:
(fun x : hfiber (fun z : A * C => (f (fst z), g (snd z))) y =>
 ((fst x.1; ap fst x.2), (snd x.1; ap snd x.2)))
o (fun xs : hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y) =>
   (((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1);
   path_prod
     (f (fst ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1)), g (snd ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1))) y
     ((fst xs).2
      :
      fst
        (f (fst ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1)), g (snd ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1))) =
      fst y)
     ((snd xs).2
      :
      snd
        (f (fst ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1)), g (snd ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1))) =
      snd y))) ==
idmap

contents: destruct y as [y1 y2]; intros [[x1 p1] [x2 p2]].

goals.conclusion:
((x1; ap fst (path_prod (f x1, g x2) (y1, y2) p1 p2)),
(x2; ap snd (path_prod (f x1, g x2) (y1, y2) p1 p2))) = 
((x1; p1), (x2; p2))

((x1; ap fst (path_prod (f x1, g x2) (f x1, g x2) 1 1)),
(x2; ap snd (path_prod (f x1, g x2) (f x1, g x2) 1 1))) = 
((x1; 1), (x2; 1))

(fun xs : hfiber f (fst y) * hfiber g (snd y) =>
 (((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1);
 path_prod
   (f (fst ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1)), g (snd ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1))) y
   ((fst xs).2
    :
    fst (f (fst ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1)), g (snd ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1))) =
    fst y)
   ((snd xs).2
    :
    snd (f (fst ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1)), g (snd ((fst xs).1, (snd xs).1))) =
    snd y)))
o (fun x : hfiber (fun z : A * C => (f (fst z), g (snd z))) y =>
   ((fst x.1; ap fst x.2), (snd x.1; ap snd x.2))) ==
idmap
